name: Oscar Sey
contact: Direct — Slack or call. Joins review calls. Handles high-stakes client retention conversations.
notes: When a client threatens to leave or pushes back on pricing, loop Oscar in. He plays the 'CEO card' and usually retains them.

name: Mani Asadi
contact: Slack — handles hiring, screening, initial sales outreach.
notes: Also involved in sales. Note: never spell 'Manny' — always 'Mani'.

name: Jonathan Forbes
contact: Slack (fastest), call if urgent. Always available for pod manager questions.
notes: Your direct manager. Runs Tuesday/Friday review calls. Escalate any account that's been red for 3+ days without resolution.

name: Tyler
contact: Slack — best peer reference for client communication and ClickUp organization.
notes: Most experienced pod manager currently. Great resource for day-to-day client management questions.

name: Cole
contact: Slack — Account Master Dashboard, Command Center, ClickUp systems.
notes: Moved from pod management to an ops/systems role. Most experienced person on internal tooling. Great for process questions.

name: Kyle Mohammed
contact: Slack — peer support. ~3 weeks ahead of Pod 4.
notes: Started March 25, 2026. Most recent onboarding experience after Pod 4.

name: Abdullah Ahmed
contact: Slack — peer support. ~3 weeks ahead of Pod 4.
notes: Started March 25, 2026. Most recent onboarding experience after Pod 4.

name: Emmanuel
contact: ClickUp — always task with full client details + 48hr deadline. For A2P, include client name + GHL sub-account link.
notes: Handles ALL account setups, A2P Wizard (GHL), technical GHL issues, landing pages. A2P goes to Emmanuel — never to pod managers. KEY PERSON.

name: Mervin
contact: ClickUp — task for setup overflow and campaign optimization.
notes: Same tier as Emmanuel. Supports on setups when Emmanuel is at capacity, and ongoing media buying. Task via ClickUp.

name: Bren
contact: ClickUp — assigned to Pod 2 primarily. May help other pods if bandwidth available.
notes: Handles creative refreshes (Canva), ad set builds for Pod 2. Can support other pods on overflow.

name: Ken
contact: ClickUp — task with: brand info, target market, reference images, due date. Plan ahead — Philippines timezone.
notes: Based in Philippines. Standard turnaround: 24 hours. Specializes in AI-generated creatives and Canva graphic design. PLAN AHEAD — never wait until something is urgent.

name: Leila
contact: Slack (#internal-team for account-specific requests, DM for direct escalations). Contact for: Logbook access, VA quality issues, booking rate problems.
notes: Primary lead for ALL VAs across ALL pods. Provides Logbook access — ask Leila, not Jonathan. Note: never spell 'Layla' — always 'Leila'.

name: Aica
contact: Slack — VA assignments and scheduling for new accounts.
notes: Works alongside Leila. Note: never 'AICA' — always 'Aica'.

name: Pamela
contact: Slack — VA scheduling and quality management.
notes: Works alongside Leila and Aica on VA operations.
